info.name: Codehooks List documents in a collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection to query

params.name: q
params.description: Advanced NoSQL JSON query object (URL-encoded). Supports MongoDB-like operators such as $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte, $ne, $in, $nin, $exists, $regex, $or, and $and.

params.name: h
params.description: Query hints as a JSON object (URL-encoded). Supports fields, sort, skip, limit, and projection.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of documents to return

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of documents to skip in the result set

params.name: sort
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to sort by. Prefix with - for descending order.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response

items.docs: Retrieve documents from a collection with optional query parameters for filtering, sorting, pagination, and field selection. Supports both simple key-value query parameters and advanced NoSQL JSON query syntax via the q parameter.

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection to add the document to

items.docs: Create a new document in the specified collection. The document will be assigned a unique _id if one is not provided.

info.name: Codehooks Get a document by ID

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the document

items.docs: Retrieve a single document from a collection by its unique identifier.

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the document

items.docs: Replace an entire document in the collection by its unique identifier. The entire document is replaced with the provided data.

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the document

items.docs: Partially update a document in the collection by its unique identifier. Only the provided fields are updated. Supports MongoDB-like update operators such as $set, $inc, $unset, $push, and $pull.

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: id
params.description: The unique identifier of the document

items.docs: Delete a single document from a collection by its unique identifier.

info.name: Codehooks Update multiple documents by query

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: q
params.description: NoSQL JSON query object (URL-encoded) to select documents to update.

items.docs: Update multiple documents in a collection that match the provided query parameters. Supports MongoDB-like update operators such as $set, $inc, $unset, $push, and $pull.

info.name: Codehooks Delete multiple documents by query

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: q
params.description: NoSQL JSON query object (URL-encoded) to select documents to delete.

items.docs: Delete multiple documents in a collection that match the provided query parameters.

info.name: Codehooks Count documents in a collection

params.name: collection
params.description: The name of the collection

params.name: q
params.description: Optional NoSQL JSON query object to filter the count

items.docs: Return the count of documents in a collection, optionally filtered by a query.

info.name: Codehooks Get a value by key

params.name: key
params.description: The key to retrieve the value for

items.docs: Retrieve a string or object value from the key-value store by its key.

params.name: key
params.description: The key to store the value under

params.name: ttl
params.description: Time-to-live in milliseconds for automatic expiration

items.docs: Store a string or object value in the key-value store with an optional TTL (time-to-live) for automatic expiration.

params.name: key
params.description: The key to delete

items.docs: Remove a key-value pair from the key-value store.

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the numeric value to increment

items.docs: Increment a numeric value in the key-value store by the specified amount.

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the numeric value to decrement

items.docs: Decrement a numeric value in the key-value store by the specified amount.

params.name: topic
params.description: The queue topic name to add the job to

items.docs: Add a job to a named queue topic. Jobs are processed asynchronously by worker functions registered for the topic.
